Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa Oberg, Esq. of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4127), appearing for defendant / moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation
Gibert L. Purcell, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Donald Salisbury

RULING:
Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is denied. Metalclad's alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to exposure (issues 1-4) and granted as to punitive damages (issue 5). Plaintiff presented sufficient evidence to permit a reasonable fact-finder to draw the inference that plaintiff was exposed to Pabco attributable to Metalclad. Metalclad's objections to the declarations of plaintiff and Charles Ay are overruled. Metalclad's objections to the prior testimony of Donald Trueblood, Wayne May and Russell Saunders are sustained. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Lertora Aliventi, CSR # 11935
